mapper.insert: INSERT INTO webhook_rule (rule_name, template_id, webhook_url, http_method, headers_json, enabled, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{templateId}, #{webhookUrl}, #{httpMethod}, #{headersJson}, #{enabled}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_name, template_id, webhook_url, http_method, headers_json, enabled, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM webhook_rule WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, rule_name, template_id, webhook_url, http_method, headers_json, enabled, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM webhook_rule WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, rule_name, template_id, webhook_url, http_method, headers_json, enabled, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM webhook_rule WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, rule_name, template_id, webhook_url, http_method, headers_json, enabled, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM webhook_rule ORDER BY created_at DESC
